Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf To Attend Deposition And To Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Leona Cannon's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to contact counsel for defendants within seven days of notice of this order to schedule their depositions. The depositions shall take place on or before February 26, 2007. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $866.60 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Furher Answers To Interrogatories Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JAMES JOHNSON - PLAINTIFF APPEARED IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.
The court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows - Plaintiff James Johnson's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories is denied. The motion was improperly noticed (CCP Section 1005) and is untimely pursuant to CCP Section 2030.300(c). In addition, the motion is denied for failure to comply with California Rules of Court 313 and 335 and CCP Section 2030.300(b). COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JAMES JOHNSON - PLAINTIFF APPEARED IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

The court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows - Plaintiff James Johnson's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories is denied. The motion was improperly noticed (CCP Section 1005) and is untimely pursuant to CCP Section 2030.300(c). In addition, the motion is denied for failure to comply with California Rules of Court 313 and 335 and CCP Section 2030.300(b). COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

NO OTHER APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Citibank South Dakota N A's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with California Rules of Court 313 and 335. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses, Pltfs' Depositions And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sun Joo chung for defendant and moving party: Leona Cannon
James Johnson plaintiff and opposing party, in propria persona

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Leona Cannon's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. Plaintiffs are ordered to contact counsel for defendant immediately to schedule their depositions. The depositions shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $337.50 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order if plaintiffs do not schedule and attend their depositions. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
